# Vendored semver Browser Bundle

- Source package: `semver@5.7.2` from the Node 24 no-publish lock baseline.
- Source file: `semver.js` bundled with browserify standalone name `rc16Semver`.
- License: ISC.

This preserves the existing Rancher UI semver behavior while removing `ember-browserify` and `npm:semver` from the application build path.
